howToTutorial.title: How to build Gemini photo sessions with our generator
howToTutorial.subtitle: Follow this workflow to turn a short brief into tested prompts, iterate fast, and publish consistent results.

callout.title: Apply the tutorial directly in the generator
callout.description: Open the generator, pick a base template, paste the structured prompt with your client variables, and save it as a preset.

steps.title: Collect real search intents
steps.description: Check Search Console for queries like "prompt gemini photoshoot" and segment them by persona.
steps.tip: Log each query with its intent (female, couple, corporate, birthday).

steps.title: Build a 5-part brief
steps.description: Summarize objective, environment, lighting, composition, and final style in short sentences.
steps.tip: Keep a reusable doc template so you can duplicate it for new clients.

steps.title: Write the base prompt
steps.description: Convert the brief into a multi-line prompt with context, technical specs, and final instructions.
steps.tip: Add realism notes and language requirements such as "reply in Portuguese".

steps.title: Test controlled variations
steps.description: Create two or three prompt variants changing only one element at a time (lighting, pose, or location).
steps.tip: Use presets to store the winning versions.

steps.title: Publish with aligned SEO
steps.description: Reuse the same keywords in titles, subheadings, and image alt text when publishing.
steps.tip: Link back to the relevant prompt guide inside the article.

steps.title: Measure and optimize
steps.description: Monitor CTR and dwell time after publishing; iterate on prompts based on performance.
steps.tip: Document the best-performing variation to replicate in future campaigns.
